title: Skopeo v1.10.0 to 1.11.1 introduced breaking change for unsupported filesystems
body:
On 1.10.1 and earlier, unsupported filesystems, such as `0x53464846` for WSLFS would not abort the command and would complete the action.

I suspect this pull request may be related to the breaking behavior:
Update c/storage after https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1436

```
skopeo inspect containers-storage:quay.io/keycloak/keycloak
FATA[0000] Error parsing image name "containers-storage:quay.io/keycloak/keycloak": filesystem type 0x53464846 reported for /var/lib/containers/storage is not supported with 'overlay': backing file system is unsupported for this graph driver
```

Reference related issue: https://github.com/containers/storage/issues/1546
